Habitats_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "6CF8C37F49115A9E4B0E13B38927C36E", "<Important>Habitats</> are buildable structures which allow for the placement of <Important>Facilities</>, as well as furnishings and decorations, within them.

There are many shapes and sizes of <Important>Habitat</> which you'll use to build up your <Important>Outpost</>, but for now, you can only construct the humble <Facility>Makeshift Habitat</>.

Constructing <Important>Habitats</>, just like <Important>Facilities</>, is done with <Important>Build Mode</> <Cyan>(B)</>.

In order to construct the <Facility>Makeshift Habitat</>, you will need to continue to scavenge <Item>Scrap</> and refine several <Item>Building Materials</>.


Clear away more <Item>Scrap</> to make space and for use in <Important>Refining</>, then construct the <Facility>Makeshift Habitat</> using <Important>Build Mode</> <Cyan>(B)</>.")
